canonical_pipeline_142_note: 142 = pre-merge hits across epochs × Δt (repo historical run)
pipeline_note: 142 → 47 → 27: raw hits (no greedy mask) → union-merge → greedy modern Δt=2 yr.
fdr_applicability: Window-level BH on overlapping sliding tests is not a valid discovery procedure (M_eff << n_windows; tests are strongly correlated). Post-hoc BH on 47 merged-series Monte Carlo p-values is reported in fdr_correction_results.csv — not a discovery claim.
